query: SELECT id, name, position, price, imageUrl FROM players WHERE position IN ('LD','LE') AND (price = 0 OR price IS NULL OR imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' OR imageUrl LIKE '%placeholder%' OR imageUrl LIKE '%undefined%') ORDER BY name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35VGbBGUduuhukx.298441852ba3 --database hhB4oykfDQM9yCvhQGaX3n --execute SELECT id, name, position, price, imageUrl FROM players WHERE position IN ('LD','LE') AND (price = 0 OR price IS NULL OR imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' OR imageUrl LIKE '%placeholder%' OR imageUrl LIKE '%undefined%') ORDER BY name;
